key.name: refresh-interval
key.summary: Refresh interval in seconds

key.name: show-cpu-temp
key.summary: Show CPU temperature in the panel

key.name: show-gpu-temp
key.summary: Show GPU temperature in the panel

key.name: show-nvme-temp
key.summary: Show NVMe temperature in the panel

key.name: show-cpu-usage
key.summary: Show CPU usage percentage in the panel

key.name: show-ram-usage
key.summary: Show RAM usage percentage in the panel

key.name: show-gpu-usage
key.summary: Show GPU usage percentage in the panel

key.name: show-nvme-usage
key.summary: Show NVMe usage percentage in the panel

key.name: show-ram-temp
key.summary: Show RAM temperature in the panel

key.name: show-network-usage
key.summary: Show network speed in the panel

key.name: show-network-temp
key.summary: Show network temperature (placeholder)

key.name: show-drive-usage
key.summary: Show drive fulfillment in the panel

key.name: show-drive-temp
key.summary: Show drive temperature (placeholder)

key.name: temp-unit
key.summary: Temperature unit (celsius or fahrenheit)

key.name: panel-display-mode
key.summary: Panel display mode (0: full, 1: compact, 2: icons-only)

key.name: warning-threshold
key.summary: Temperature warning threshold in Celsius

key.name: critical-threshold
key.summary: Temperature critical threshold in Celsius

key.name: widget-x
key.summary: Widget X coordinate

key.name: widget-y
key.summary: Widget Y coordinate

key.name: widget-width
key.summary: Widget width

key.name: widget-orientation
key.summary: Widget orientation (0: vertical, 1: horizontal)

key.name: widget-max-width
key.summary: Widget size X (0 for auto)

key.name: widget-max-height
key.summary: Widget size Y (0 for auto)

key.name: show-scroll-buttons
key.summary: Show manual scroll buttons in the widget

key.name: enable-scrolling
key.summary: Enable mouse scrolling in the widget
